query: SELECT id, primary_domain, status, JSON_EXTRACT(pipeline_output, '$.error') as error_msg, JSON_EXTRACT(pipeline_output, '$.failedAt') as failed_at, JSON_EXTRACT(pipeline_output, '$.stack') as stack_trace FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE status = 'failed' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
